description: Popular literature in rhymed Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably no earlier than 13th century. 8 folios. NB: Goitein's index card refers to this fragment as "daily household expenditure for the months of Shevaṭ and Adar," but this must refer to a different fragment, probably somewhere in the T-S Ar.54 folder.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
